description.value: When anyone asks how tough you are, all you have to say is, "I'm from Rodnarth." You've survived more extreme disasters than most can count, and your body has adapted to danger by storing a small reservoir of primal energy from the fonqon trees. The first time each day you would die because of the dying condition, your body draws on this reservoir, and you instead survive. Your remain at 1 Hit Point, and your dying value becomes 0, but you gain a wounded value equal to 1 less than the dying value that would normally kill you (typically @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Wounded]{Wounded 3}).
